summary: Comprehensive testing of Messaging Center module (Email SMTP + WhatsApp Business API). Backend: 19/19 tests passed. Frontend: All 5 tabs working correctly with proper UI elements and data display.
seed_data_creation: 9 templates (5 WhatsApp + 4 Email) and 25+ delivery logs auto-seeded via /api/messaging-center/seed-demo
context_for_next_testing_agent: Messaging Center module fully functional. Route: /messaging-dashboard. All providers run in SANDBOX mode - no real SMTP or WhatsApp API calls. Demo data auto-seeds on first page load.
